name: Gary's Grill
address: 375 Mesa Dr, Del Valle, TX 78617, USA
review_1_text: We just moved into town and decided to check out Gary’s Grill. The burger and the fried shrimp were piping hot and tasted great. Staff was so nice, they gave us a slice of watermelon on the way out!
review_2_text: Hands down one of the best burgers I’ve ever had! The flavors were on point, and the service was amazing—super friendly and fast. Total hidden gem! I’m definitely coming back and bringing the whole crew next time. If you haven’t been yet, you’re seriously missing out!
review_3_text: Just stopped by and had one of the best burgers I’ve ever had, the gravy with fried was delicious! Staff is very friendly and professional, service was fast! loved everything about my visit. Excited to keep stopping by!
review_4_text: We got onion rings, El Macho Burger and a Double Cheeseburger. Large portion sizes and everything tasted great!
review_5_text:
I married a local and she raves about Gary’s Grill - when they recently reopened, I finally got a chance to taste for myself what all the fuss was about!

These are some gooood burgers!!!

Thanks for reopening, Gary!!!
editorial_summary: Clean restaurant offering taco salads, burgers, pizza and Mexican dishes.
